allow: Bash(node -e "const {GoogleGenerativeAI} = require\(''./node_modules/@google/generative-ai/dist/index.js''\); const genAI = new GoogleGenerativeAI\(''test''\); const model = genAI.getGenerativeModel\({ model: ''gemini-1.5-flash'' }\); console.log\(''model methods:'', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(model\)\)\)")
